banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock filer: Sarah Whitman, a US citizen who moved to Reykjavík in March 2025 to work as a software contractor for a single Icelandic employer, 'Nordur Software ehf.'. She has lived in Iceland for less than three years, is unmarried with no dependent children, owns no real estate/securities/shares, and is not self-employed — so she is eligible to file RSK 1.13 rather than the full RSK 1.10/1.01 return. She remained resident in Iceland through the end of the 2025 income year (no departure), has one Icelandic savings account, elects the standard 4%-max pension fund deduction, and requests any refund into her own Icelandic bank account. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real filer's information.
